steps.title: Pick two well-separated points on the trend
steps.content: The scatterplot trends linearly upward. Two clear points on the trend are about $(23\%, 1100)$ near the lower-left and $(71\%, 1360)$ near the upper-right.

steps.title: Find a linear fit through the trend
steps.content: Slope: $$m = \frac{1360 - 1100}{71 - 23} = \frac{260}{48} \approx 5.42.$$ Using $(23, 1100)$: $b = 1100 - 5.42(23) \approx 975.4$. So the trend line is approximately $y \approx 5.42x + 975$.

steps.title: Predict density at 60% and match a choice
steps.content: $$y \approx 5.42(60) + 975 \approx 325 + 975 = 1300\text{ kg/m}^{3}.$$ Of the choices 1,200 / 1,250 / 1,300 / 1,350, the prediction is closest to 1,300. That matches choice C — C is correct.
